name: Live Demo / Home Party Funnel
origin: Live broadcast on Facebook/Instagram/YouTube/Zoom demonstrating a product or building something in real time (QVC-style). Recording stays live with buy buttons below the player. The Network Marketing Home Party variant adds a Party Invite registration, a social-share confirmation, and invite-a-friend mechanics for duplication.

whenToUse.summary: Use to sell a product by demonstrating it live (or building something in real time) with buy buttons under the player, then keep the replay selling. Add the Home Party variant for network-marketing duplication and invite-a-friend virality.
goals: Sell via live product demonstration (QVC-style) with instant buy buttons
Keep the replay selling indefinitely with persistent buy links
(NM variant) Drive invite-a-friend duplication for a virtual home party
signals: Physical or visual product that benefits from live demonstration
Client comfortable going live on FB/IG/YT/Zoom
Network-marketing duplication goal (home party invite mechanics)
Wants impulse buys during/after a live event
antiSignals: Complex high-ticket offer needing full Perfect Webinar (use Webinar)

pageStructure.purpose: (NM Home Party variant) Register attendees and frame the live party; for a plain live demo this can route directly to the broadcast page.
keyElements: Fun, social headline + host + 'what we'll show/build live'
(Plain demo) optional skip straight to broadcast

pageStructure.purpose: Confirm the seat and trigger invite-a-friend sharing (duplication mechanics).
keyElements: Invite-a-friend share buttons with pre-filled message + personal link
Incentive to invite (unlock bonus / party gift)

pageStructure.purpose: Host the live demo/build with buy buttons directly below the player.
keyElements: Product CTA / buy button(s) directly below the player

pageStructure.purpose: Keep the recording selling with persistent buy links.
keyElements: Persistent buy button(s) below the player
Highlights / timestamps of key demo moments

scripts: Live demo narrative = Epiphany Bridge + Viral Loop (story → demo → call to action), especially the NM Home Party variant
Buy-button copy, share prompts, live-only bonus urgency = Copywriting Secrets
Product framing on the broadcast/replay = Star/Story/Solution (compressed)
Optional teach-then-show beats = Perfect Webinar (one secret) if the demo includes a mini-pitch
copyFramework.notes: Energy and live social proof drive this funnel. The Network Marketing Home Party variant leans hardest on the Viral Loop and invite-a-friend duplication; a plain QVC-style demo can skip the registration/share pages and start at the broadcast page.

ghlBuild.funnelType: Funnel (2-4 pages) + live/replay embeds + referral mechanics
skill44Widgets: Social-share / referral block with personal links
Order button / order form blocks below the player
automations: Invite-a-friend referral tracking → unlock bonus on N referrals
(NM) duplication: new builders get their own party-invite funnel clone
ghlBuild.notes: Skill 6 builds the broadcast and replay pages with buy buttons under the player; for the NM Home Party variant it also builds the party-invite registration + social-share confirmation pages. Skill 44 generates the opt-in form, the referral/share block, the order button/form, and the reminder widgets.
